Class AsiContainerPreferences

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.agi.event.BasicPropertyChangeSource
uno.anahata.asi.AsiContainerPreferences
All Implemented Interfaces:
PropertyChangeSource, Rebindable
public class AsiContainerPreferences extends BasicPropertyChangeSource
A unified, serializable POJO that acts as a container for all user-configured preferences. This is the root object that gets persisted to disk and is responsible for its own persistence. Logic: Uses the atomic save pattern (write to .tmp then ATOMIC_MOVE) to prevent corruption.

  • Field Details

    • PREFERENCES_FILE_NAME

      private static final String PREFERENCES_FILE_NAME
      The standard filename used to persist the container's preference file on disk.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CURRENT_DNA_VERSION

      public static final int CURRENT_DNA_VERSION
      The current authoritative version of the AgiConfig DNA. Increment this whenever default policies or configurations are refined in the codebase to trigger a 'Metabolic Drift' detection in the UI.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • dnaVersion

      private int dnaVersion
      The version of the DNA template currently stored on disk.

      Implementation details: Used to detect if the saved defaults are from an older version of Anahata and trigger an update if necessary.

    • loadFailed

      private transient boolean loadFailed
      Flag indicating if the last attempt to load preferences from disk failed. This is transient and used to notify the UI of an 'Evolutionary Wipe' or structural mismatch during a version upgrade.

    • toolPermissions

      private Map<String, ToolPermission> toolPermissions
      A map where the key is the tool name (e.g., "LocalFiles.readFile") and the value is the user's stored preference for that tool.

    • registeredProviders

      private List<AbstractAiProvider> registeredProviders
      The master list of configured AI provider instances (e.g., 'Gemini Native', 'Ollama Local'). These instances are serialized directly to disk, allowing custom URLs and tokenizers to be persisted without code changes.

    • agiTemplate

      private AgiConfig agiTemplate
      A blueprint configuration for new Agi sessions. This allows users to set global defaults for models, toolkits, and retry policies.

      DNA Note: The template's selectedProviderClass and selectedModelId fields serve as the global defaults for the 'Starting XI'.

    • requestTemplate

      private RequestConfig requestTemplate
      A blueprint configuration for API requests. This allows users to set global defaults for temperature, max tokens, etc.

  • Constructor Details

    • AsiContainerPreferences

      public AsiContainerPreferences()
      Default constructor ensuring template initialization.

  • Method Details

    • resetAgiTemplate

      public void resetAgiTemplate(AbstractAsiContainer container)
      Resets the AgiConfig template to the current runtime defaults.

      Implementation details: Invoked when the application version changes and new toolkits or default policies are introduced to keep the DNA in sync with the codebase.

      Parameters:
      container - The ASI container providing the new defaults.

    • isAgiTemplateOutdated

      public boolean isAgiTemplateOutdated(AbstractAsiContainer container)
      Detects if the saved AgiConfig template is out of sync with the current runtime's factory defaults (e.g. toolkits added or removed).
      Parameters:
      container - The ASI container.
      Returns:
      true if a DNA mismatch is detected.

    • ensureTemplatesInitialized

      public void ensureTemplatesInitialized(AbstractAsiContainer container)
      Ensures that the templates are initialized using the provided container as a reference for defaults.
      Parameters:
      container - The ASI container.

    • createAgiConfig

      public AgiConfig createAgiConfig(@NonNull @NonNull AbstractAsiContainer container)
      Creates a deep-cloned instance of the AgiConfig template, bound to the specified container and assigned a fresh session ID.
      Parameters:
      container - The container to bind the new config to.
      Returns:
      A fresh AgiConfig clone, or a new default config if no template exists.

    • createRequestConfig

      public RequestConfig createRequestConfig(@NonNull @NonNull Agi agi)
      Creates a deep-cloned instance of the RequestConfig template, bound to the specified Agi session.
      Parameters:
      agi - The Agi session to bind the new request config to.
      Returns:
      A fresh RequestConfig clone, or a new default config if no template exists.

    • save

      public void save(AbstractAsiContainer config)
      Saves the current state of this preferences object to disk. Uses an atomic write pattern to ensure data integrity.
      Parameters:
      config - The application-wide configuration, used to determine the correct storage location.

    • load

      public static AsiContainerPreferences load(AbstractAsiContainer config)
      Loads the preferences for a given host application from disk.

      Implementation details: Uses KryoUtils to deserialize the preferences. If loading fails due to corruption or evolutionary mismatch, the file is backed up and a fresh preferences object is returned.

      Parameters:
      config - The application-wide container.
      Returns:
      The loaded preferences or a new instance on failure.

    • getPreferencesFile

      private static Path getPreferencesFile(AbstractAsiContainer config)
      Resolves the absolute path to the persistent preferences file for a given container.
      Parameters:
      config - The active container instance.
      Returns:
      The absolute path to the preferences file.
